title: [Moore] Introduce Mem2Reg to eliminate local variables

features.name: local int variable declaration in always_comb block
features.description: Code should include an always_comb procedure block containing a local variable declaration of type int

features.name: blocking assignment chain with local variable in always_comb
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block where a local variable is assigned an expression using a module-level variable, then the local variable is used in another blocking assignment

features.name: local variable read after blocking assignment in always_comb
features.description: Code should include a local variable in an always_comb block that receives a blocking assignment and is then read in a subsequent expression
